## Summary
Brief description of what this PR does.

## Type
- [ ] feat — new feature
- [ ] fix — bug fix
- [ ] chore — tooling, config, dependencies
- [ ] docs — documentation
- [ ] refactor — code change, no new feature or bug fix
- [ ] test — adding or updating tests

## Checklist
- [ ] TypeScript — no new type errors (pnpm typecheck passes)
- [ ] Lint — no new lint errors (pnpm lint passes)
- [ ] Tests — all existing tests pass, new tests added where appropriate
- [ ] Migrations — if DB changes, migration file included and tested locally
- [ ] Docs — relevant documentation updated
- [ ] No new ideas added to v1 scope (new ideas go in V2_IDEAS.txt)
